title: NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Research Staff Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) has released the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Research Staff Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and Chemical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the NIT Raipur Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is...
